---
name: Integration Request
about: Request support for a new DevOps tool
title: "[INTEGRATION] "
labels: integration
assignees: ''
---

## Tool Name

Name and version of the tool.

## Category

- [ ] IaC (Infrastructure as Code)
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Containers & Orchestration
- [ ] Cloud & Virtualization
- [ ] Monitoring & Observability
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Database
- [ ] Communication
- [ ] Project Management
- [ ] Networking
- [ ] Web Servers
- [ ] Backup
- [ ] Server Administration
- [ ] Other

## Desired Operations

What should OTTO be able to do with this tool?

- [ ] Read/query status
- [ ] Create/modify resources
- [ ] Troubleshoot issues
- [ ] Review configurations
- [ ] Other: ...

## API / CLI

- **CLI tool:** (e.g., `mytool`, if applicable)
- **API docs:** (URL to API documentation)
- **MCP server:** (if an MCP server exists)

## Priority

How important is this integration for your workflow?

- [ ] Critical - I can't use OTTO without it
- [ ] High - Would significantly improve my workflow
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Would be cool someday
